name: Splendor Complex
summary: An AMC of 250+ cameras that keeps growing — 28 elevator cameras and 40 new cameras added and counting.
challenge: A large JVLR complex needed both ongoing maintenance of an extensive camera estate and a partner who could expand coverage as needs grew.
solution: Konect maintains an AMC of 250+ cameras, recently adding 28 elevator cameras and a further 40 new cameras to the system.
result: A growing account where the client keeps adding cameras — the surest sign that the maintenance relationship is working.
